tool_args.label: $591.785M TBTA PMT Green Bonds Series 2024B Pricing

payload.description: MTA priced $591.785 million of Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Payroll Mobility Tax Senior Lien Green Bonds, Series 2024B (Climate Bond Certified). Proceeds used to retire $525.685 million of TBTA PMT BANs Series 2022A and refund $115.000 million of certain Transportation Revenue Bonds. Closing May 20, 2024.

tool_args.label: PMT 2024B Bond - All-in TIC
MTA Total Agency Average Farebox Operating Ratio YTD April 2024
NYCT Farebox Operating Ratio YTD April 2024
LIRR Farebox Operating Ratio YTD April 2024
MNR Farebox Operating Ratio YTD April 2024
2024 Adopted Budget based on McKinsey midpoint

payload.claim_text: The 2024 Adopted Budget is based on the midpoint between the McKinsey-prepared 'high case' and 'low case' scenarios.

tool_args.label: Different farebox methodology used for LIRR/MNR committee

payload.claim_text: In the agenda materials for the Metro-North/Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting, farebox operating ratios for the LIRR and MNR use a revised methodology to put the railroads on a more comparable basis, and differ from the statistics presented in this table.

tool_args.label: Preliminary results subject to review

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the YTD results.
payload.missing_information: Post-close adjustments not yet captured in monthly actuals

tool_args.label: Positions data subject to revision

payload.gap_text: Positions data are as of March 19, 2024 and are subject to revision as well as adjustments.
payload.missing_information: Positions data is as of March 19, not end of April

tool_args.label: $43M accounting adjustment for 2023 Headquarters expenses

payload.claim_text: Reported operating expenses were significantly impacted by a positive accounting adjustment of $43 million in March that reverses accruals of 2023 Headquarters expenses.

tool_args.label: Passenger revenues down $539M from 2019

payload.claim_text: April YTD passenger revenues were down $539 million (28%) compared with YTD April 2019.

tool_args.label: LIRR farebox ratio includes GCMOC expenses

payload.claim_text: Long Island Rail Road farebox operating ratios include expenses associated with the Grand Central Madison Operating Company (GCMOC), which is responsible for the LIRR-operating portion of Grand Central Terminal.

tool_args.label: Report published by MTA for Finance Committee
